kunai_throw.name: Kunai Throw
kunai_throw.description: Setup/Builder: A quick, ranged kunai throw. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Mudra Pip.

mudra_weaving.name: Mudra Weaving
mudra_weaving.description: Setup: Weave your hands in spiritual patterns. Generates 2 Mudra Pips and grants [Focused].

fire_style_fireball.name: Fire Style: Fireball
fire_style_fireball.description: Payoff: Exhale a sphere of pure heat. Consumes 5 Mudra Pips to deal massive Fire damage in an AOE.

water_style_flood.name: Water Style: Flood
water_style_flood.description: Payoff: Summon a wave of heavy water to push back enemies. Consumes 3 Mudra Pips and applies [Saturated].

kawarimi.name: Kawarimi (Substitution)
kawarimi.description: Defense: Swap positions with a log. The next incoming attack deals 0 damage and grants [Concealed].

shadow_clone.name: Shadow Clone
shadow_clone.description: Defense: Create a temporary clone. Increases Evasion by 30% for 4 ticks.

ninja_stride.name: Ninja Stride
ninja_stride.description: Mobility: Teleport to a target or adjacent room instantly.

ninjutsu_mastery.name: Ninjutsu Mastery
ninjutsu_mastery.description: Utility/Signature: Your next 3 Mudra-based skills cost 0 Pips.

ninja_physiology.name: Ninja Physiology
ninja_physiology.description: Passive: Way of the Shinobi. You gain 10% movement speed and your Shadow Step breaks all status effects.
